Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT
Off Calendar Sep-17-2018 Continued To Oct-29-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexandra Letzel for Paula Bennett (Successor Trustee).
Michelle Hagan (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Letzel stated that she prepared a detailed declaration addressing fees, that she will file it, and that since the time her Client has been administering the Trust all of the Beneficiaries have received $80,000.44. Ms. Letzel also stated that her Client made distributions at various times in order for some of the Beneficiaries to have a steady stream of income, that all of the loans including the ones to Mr. Monroe have been re-paid, that this Trust was established and administered as one Trust since 1970, and that it makes no sense to divide it into six Trusts. In addition, Ms. Letzel stated that there is only one cash asset in the Trust at about $400,000.00 to $500,000.00, and that the next distribution is to take place in four years and one day. Ms. Hagan stated that this hearing was not noticed timely, raised a jurisdictional issue stating that all of the bank statements indicate a Kentfield address which is in Marin County, stated that she intends to file objections to the first account and the supplemental account, requested a four to six week continuance, and asked that the petitioner turn over some documents and address the jurisdictional issue. The First Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is continued to October 29, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Hagan's objections are to be filed by October 15, 2018. Ms. Letzel's reply is to be filed by October 22, 2018.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
